title: Al-Ma'mun's fatal illness at al-Budandun; his last testament and commendation to al-Mu 'tasim; his death on 18 Rajab 218
description: Al-Ma'mun's fatal illness at al-Budandun; his last testament and commendation to al-Mu 'tasim; his death on 18 Rajab 218. Recorded under the year 218 AH (833–834 CE) in al-Tabari's History, volume 32.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 32
